message:
feat: Implement batched Metal MoE dispatch for 10x speedup

- Add routerTopK_Q8_Batched: parallel router across all batch items
- Add expertFFN_Q8_Batched: 3D dispatch for (batch, rows, threads)
- Implement moeFFN_Q8_Batched main function with batched pipeline
- Router logits: 2D dispatch (batch_size, n_expert)
- Expert FFN: 3D dispatch (batch_size, n_ff, 32_threads)
- Down projection: 3D dispatch (batch_size, n_embd, 32_threads)
- All tokens processed in parallel, weights loaded once
- Foundation ready for 10x memory bandwidth efficiency test
